look_left.instructions: Rotate your head left in a smooth movement

look_left_return.instructions: Rotate your head left in a smooth movement, then return to a neutral position

look_left_fast.instructions: Rotate your head left in a fast movement

look_left_fast_return.instructions: Rotate your head left in a fast movement, then return to a neutral position

look_right.instructions: Rotate your head right in a smooth movement

look_right_return.instructions: Rotate your head right in a smooth movement, then return to a neutral position

look_right_fast.instructions: Rotate your head right in a fast movement

look_right_fast_return.instructions: Rotate your head right in a fast movement, then return to a neutral position

look_up.instructions: Rotate your head up in a smooth movement

look_up_return.instructions: Rotate your head up in a smooth movement, then return to a neutral position

look_up_fast.instructions: Rotate your head up in a fast movement

look_up_fast_return.instructions: Rotate your head up in a fast movement, then return to a neutral position

look_down.instructions: Rotate your head down in a smooth movement

look_down_return.instructions: Rotate your head down in a smooth movement, then return to a neutral position

look_down_fast.instructions: Rotate your head down in a fast movement

look_down_fast_return.instructions: Rotate your head down in a fast movement, then return to a neutral position

tilt_left.instructions: Tilt your head left in a smooth movement

tilt_left_return.instructions: Tilt your head left in a smooth movement, then return to a neutral position

tilt_left_fast.instructions: Tilt your head left in a fast movement

tilt_left_fast_return.instructions: Tilt your head left in a fast movement, then return to a neutral position

tilt_right.instructions: Tilt your head right in a smooth movement

tilt_right_return.instructions: Tilt your head right in a smooth movement, then return to a neutral position

tilt_right_fast.instructions: Tilt your head right in a fast movement

tilt_right_fast_return.instructions: Tilt your head right in a fast movement, then return to a neutral position

shake_leftright.instructions: look left, then right in a smooth movement

shake_leftright_return.instructions: look left, then right in a smooth movement, then return to a neutral position

shake_leftright_fast.instructions: look left, then right in a fast movement

shake_leftright_fast_return.instructions: look left, then right in a fast movement, then return to a neutral position

shake_rightleft.instructions: look right, then left in a smooth movement

shake_rightleft_return.instructions: look right, then left in a smooth movement, then return to a neutral position

shake_rightleft_fast.instructions: look right, then left in a fast movement

shake_rightleft_fast_return.instructions: look right, then left in a fast movement, then return to a neutral position

behind_left.instructions: Look behind you in a smooth leftwards motion

behind_left_return.instructions: Look behind you in a smooth leftwards motion, then return to a neutral position

behind_left_fast.instructions: Look behind you in a fast leftwards motion

behind_left_fast_return.instructions: Look behind you in a fast leftwards motion, then return to a neutral position

behind_right.instructions: Look behind you in a smooth rightwards motion

behind_right_return.instructions: Look behind you in a smooth rightwards motion, then return to a neutral position

behind_right_fast.instructions: Look behind you in a fast rightwards motion

behind_right_fast_return.instructions: Look behind you in a fast rightwards motion, then return to a neutral position

nod.instructions: repeatedly nod your head for 1-2 seconds

look_around.instructions: Move your head in random directions

look_direction.instructions: Move your head to a random direction and stay still

sit_down.instructions: Start standing up, sit down on a chair

get_up.instructions: Start sitting down, get out of a chair
